---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Sigbound doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Keep in mind the project's ground rules: build on top
of git, never rebuild it; parsers never panic; never land unverified code.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed.

## Merge-path features

If the request changes the merge / integration path, attach a `sigbench`
scenario (or a sketch of one) showing the case you want handled — it makes the
proposal concrete and testable.
